description_long: This object is a modern, tactical-style shotgun with a robust, rectangular body and a dual-barrel configuration. The barrels are positioned side-by-side, each with a prominent circular muzzle, and the top features a long Picatinny rail for mounting accessories. The main body is metallic with vented slots along the sides, likely for heat dissipation, and a black under-rail for additional attachments. The rear section includes a compact, angular pistol grip and a squared trigger guard, with no visible full stock. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on modularity and tactical use, and the color scheme is primarily metallic gray and black. The construction appears to be mostly metal with some polymer components for the grip and guard.
description: A modern, tactical side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a metallic body, Picatinny rail, and a compact pistol grip. The design is robust and modular, featuring a gray and black color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two large, circular barrels side-by-side and the full length of the top rail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the vented barrel shroud, under-rail, and the angular pistol grip with squared trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the barrels, the grip, and the compact rear section without a full stock.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the metallic body, venting, and attachment rails.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with vented shroud and long Picatinny rail on top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated trigger guard with a robust, angular profile and no visible finger grooves
